stdout:
Implemented targeted physics fixes from `feedback_input.json` in [db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html).

What I changed:
- Stabilized energy growth by tuning collision loss and adding stronger damping:
  - `restitution` lowered, `friction` tuned, added `quadraticDrag`, lowered `maxSpeed`.
  - See [index.html:85](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html:85) and [index.html:322](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html:322).
- Reduced tunneling risk with adaptive physics sub-stepping per frame:
  - Added `targetSubstep`, `maxSubsteps`, and substep selection by travel distance/time.
  - See [index.html:91](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html:91) and [index.html:354](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html:354).
- Improved moving-wall collision response with explicit tangential transfer term:
  - Added `tangentialTransfer` and applied it in collision resolution.
  - See [index.html:87](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html:87) and [index.html:297](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html:297).
- Increased CCD impact budget to better resolve dense/corner collision sequences:
  - See [index.html:233](/C:/Users/William/Desktop/Projects/Genai_2026/db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html:233).

Validation:
- Ran `npm.cmd test`.
- Runtime/unit tests passed; UI interaction test failed due environment permission (`spawn EPERM` launching Playwright Chromium), not due JS syntax failure.
